name: kml-gpx-converter
description: Private, browser-only KML, KMZ, GPX, and GeoJSON route converter

scripts.check: node --check js/parser.js && node --check js/builder.js && node --check js/geojson.js && node --check js/app.js && node --check service-worker.js
scripts.test: echo 'Open tests/parser-builder.html in a browser to run tests'
